_comment: Alert gating. alert_score is 0-100 (see feedback_learning.py). Only alerts that pass mutes, recency, the cross-source verification gate, and the score threshold are sent; suppressed ones are still stored with a reason.
_verification: Hold non-primary claims until confirmed across sources.
_relay: Prediction markets skip recency (hot-when-traded). News-type relay (ratings/SEC/institutional news) must be within relay_max_age_hours. Per-source caps + recency bound first-run volume.
